title: Mystical Meghalaya
shortDescription: Living root bridges, crystal clear rivers, and the Scotland of the East.
overview: Journey into the Abode of Clouds. Marvel at the living root bridges, boat on the crystal clear Umngot River, and chase stunning waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Shillong Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, Ward's Lake.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Cherrapunji
itinerary.description: Visit Seven Sisters Falls and Mawsmai Cave.

itinerary.title: Root Bridge Trek
itinerary.description: Trek to the Double Decker Living Root Bridge.

itinerary.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong
itinerary.description: Cleanest village in Asia and crystal clear Umngot river.
